title: Howard AI Officially Begins Pre-Launch Campaign
description: Howard AI has officially entered its five-month pre-launch marketing campaign focused on Houston households and businesses. The campaign will focus heavily on privacy-first messaging and real-world task execution.

title: Prototype Development Continues
description: The Howard prototype continues active development with local hardware infrastructure, API integrations, and task execution systems being tested internally.

title: Houston Expansion Strategy Finalized
description: Howard AI finalized its initial Houston service strategy targeting The Woodlands, River Oaks, Memorial, Sugar Land, and Katy for first-wave customer acquisition.
